LogPage.title: Log Tasks
LogPage.description: Record your work in natural language. AI auto-parses time and tags.

TaskInput.placeholder:
Record your work in natural language, e.g.:
Fixed login page bug from 10am to 12pm
Had a meeting to discuss new requirements at 2pm, lasted 1 hour
TaskInput.hint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line

TaskList.noTasks: No tasks recorded for this day.

CalendarPage.title: Calendar
CalendarPage.description: Browse your work logs by date.

StatsPage.title: Statistics
StatsPage.description: View your work hours distribution and tag statistics.

BatchModal.title: Confirm Tasks ({count} total)
BatchModal.description: Review AI-parsed task details. You can edit or delete before saving.

Api.atLeastOneTask: At least one valid task is required
